description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build_image that uses the docker:git Docker image and the docker:dind service. The job should run only on the master branch. In the script, first run env to print environment variables, then log in to registry.gitlab.com with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, then build the Docker image tagging it as registry.gitlab.com/nkovacs/docker-builder, and finally push the image as registry.gitlab.com/nkovacs/docker-builder:latest. No explicit stages are defined, so the job runs in the default stage.
